name: Parvati Shallow
signature_move: Founded the Black Widow Brigade, an all-female alliance that systematically blindsided every remaining man post-merge, culminating in convincing Erik Reichenbach to surrender his immunity necklace at Final 5 — widely regarded as the greatest single move in Survivor history.
strategy_summary: Parvati leveraged her social game and interpersonal magnetism to build trust across tribal lines, then weaponized those relationships by assembling the Black Widow Brigade — a five-woman alliance that controlled every post-merge vote. She orchestrated Ozzy's 5-4 blindside, manipulated Erik into giving up immunity, and maintained alliance loyalty despite being an obvious threat, winning a 5-3 jury vote over Amanda Kimmel by owning her cutthroat gameplay at Final Tribal Council.
fun_fact: Parvati is one of only two players in Survivor history to win the game with a 100% voting accuracy rate across all tribal councils she attended in her winning season — she voted correctly at every single one of the 8 tribals where she cast a vote.
